inputs.name: ariaLabel
inputs.description: Sets the `aria-label` attribute to the element.

inputs.name: ariaLabelledBy
inputs.description: Sets the `aria-label` attribute to the element.

inputs.name: autoHeight
inputs.description: When set to true the grid list item's height will be set to auto

inputs.name: disableToolbarClick
inputs.description: Whether click on the custom toolbar is disabled

inputs.name: isNavigated
inputs.description:
The navigated state of the list item.
If set to true, a navigation indicator is displayed at the end of the list item.

inputs.name: noPadding
inputs.description: Remove the padding from the Item body

inputs.name: selected
inputs.description: Allows an item to be selected programmatically

inputs.name: state
inputs.description:
Sets the state of Grid List Item
(States: unread | error | locked | draft)

inputs.name: status
inputs.description:
Defines the status of Grid List Item
(Statuses: success | warning | error | neutral)

inputs.name: titleLevel
inputs.description:
Aria-level of the title
Available options: 1, 2, 3, 4, 5, 6
Default: 4

inputs.name: value
inputs.description:
Value field stores information for radio button value, checkbox button and for GridListSelectionEvent
The field is mandatory for modes like singleSelect, singleSelectLeft, singleSelectRight or multiSelect

outputs.name: cardClick
outputs.description: Event is thrown on grid list item click.

outputs.name: delete
outputs.description:
Event is thrown, when mode delete
and Delete button was pressed

outputs.name: detail
outputs.description:
Event is thrown, when type is detail or detailsAndActive
and Detail button was pressed

outputs.name: draft
outputs.description:
Event is thrown, when state is error, not used GridListItemFooterBarComponent
and Draft button was pressed

outputs.name: locked
outputs.description:
Event is thrown, when state is locked, not used GridListItemFooterBarComponent
and Locked button was pressed

outputs.name: navigate
outputs.description:
Event is thrown, when type is navigation
and Navigate button was pressed

outputs.name: press
outputs.description:
Event is thrown, when type is active
and item is pressed
